title: AIG 2024 Annual Report
note: Primary source for AIG's 2024 premiums, underwriting performance, reinsurance strategy, claims positioning, and capital-return context.

title: Business Insurance
note: Primary product page showing AIG's commercial risk solutions, claims portals, multinational services, and business insurance categories.

title: Private Client Select
note: Product source for AIG's high-net-worth personal-lines channel and policyholder service entry point.

title: American International Group Market Cap
note: Market data source reporting AIG market capitalization of $39.13 billion as of June 2, 2026.

title: Oasis Loss Modelling Framework
note: Open-source catastrophe modelling platform and open framework relevant to transparent insurance risk modelling and open data standards.

title: Oasis Loss Modelling Framework GitHub
note: Repository organization for Oasis LMF open-source catastrophe modelling software.

title: Etherisc
note: Decentralized insurance protocol source for parametric insurance, smart-contract coverage, oracle-triggered claims, and peer-to-peer capital concepts.
